headline: JPMorgan Sees Australia IPO Demand Resilient to Stock Turmoil
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Australia’s pipeline for initial public offerings is showing signs of resilience, even as the war in Iran rattles the stock market and fuels uncertainty, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.“We continue to see a robust IPO pipeline in Australia with investors still eager to meet with high quality companies,” Justin Grimmond, head of equity capital markets for Australia and New Zealand at JPMorgan, said in an interview. The firm ranked first in underwriting equity and rights offerings

The firm ranked first in underwriting equity and rights offerings

headline: Is It Time To Reassess JPMorgan Chase (JPM) After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether JPMorgan Chase at around US$283.77 still offers value, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share performance and current fundamentals are really telling you. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 2.1% decline over the last 7 days and a 5.5% decline over the past month, alongside an 18.1% gain over 1 year and very large returns over 3 years and 108.5% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on JPMorgan Chase as one of the major US banks, with...

headline: JPMorgan expands digital assets push with Mitsubishi deal as it targets $10bn in daily transactions
summary: Mitsubishi will use JPMorgan digital assets rails for payment solutions. The investment bank aims to double the amount of transactions used by Kinexys. It comes as Wall Street warms to crypto and blockchain technology.

content.title: JPMorgan expands digital assets push with Mitsubishi deal as it targets $10bn in daily transactions
content.summary: Mitsubishi will use JPMorgan digital assets rails for payment solutions. The investment bank aims to double the amount of transactions used by Kinexys. It comes as Wall Street warms to crypto and blockchain technology.

headline: JPMorgan Chase Jersey City Layoffs Reflect Ongoing Workforce Rebalancing
summary: JPMorgan Chase plans to lay off 134 employees in Jersey City as part of an ongoing workforce redeployment effort. The move follows several prior rounds of cuts, alongside continued hiring in other parts of the bank. The layoffs highlight shifting priorities within NYSE:JPM as it adjusts teams to current business needs. For investors watching NYSE:JPM, this workforce change comes with the stock trading around $283.77 and a return of 18.1% over the past year. Over longer periods, returns of...

headline: JPMorgan plans to lend $80 billion to US small businesses, hire 1,000 bankers
summary: JPMorgan Chase said on Tuesday it plans to lend $80 billion to US small businesses over the next decade and add 1,000 bankers as part of a multiyear push to go after more Main Street customers.

content.title: JPMorgan plans to lend $80 billion to US small businesses, hire 1,000 bankers
content.summary: JPMorgan Chase said on Tuesday it plans to lend $80 billion to US small businesses over the next decade and add 1,000 bankers as part of a multiyear push to go after more Main Street customers.

headline: JPMorgan or Bank of America: Jefferies Names the Top Banking Stock to Buy for 2026
summary: Large-cap banks have long appealed to investors for a few core reasons – they tend to generate steady earnings through net interest income, benefit from higher rates via wider lending spreads, and return a meaningful share of profits through dividends. Their scale and diversified revenue streams, spanning lending, trading, and advisory, also help cushion performance across cycles. With those strengths as a foundation, Jefferies analyst David Chiaverini argues the backdrop is becoming even more s

headline: How The IDP Education (ASX:IEL) Story Is Shifting As Valuation And Volume Risks Collide
summary: IDP Education’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly, with the price target moving from A$6.85 to A$6.80. This keeps it within a similar range while still flagging a small reset in expectations. This shift sits against a backdrop of mixed broker research, where some analysts point to execution risks and student volume uncertainty, while others see room for upside relative to targets closer to A$4.90. Read on to see how these views shape the evolving narrative around valuation and...

headline: JPMorgan Chase rolls out new effort to expand economic opportunity
summary: The bank plans to lend $80 billion to small businesses over the next 10 years as part of what it's calling the "American Dream Initiative."

content.title: JPMorgan Chase rolls out new effort to expand economic opportunity

headline: JPMorgan to Hire 1,000 Bankers, Boost Lending in Small Business Push
summary: CEO Jamie Dimon said the initiative was part of an effort to revive an American dream he views as “slipping out of reach for too many people.”

headline: JPMorganChase Launches American Dream Initiative to Expand Local Economic Opportunity
summary: NEW YORK, March 31, 2026--JPMorganChase today announced the American Dream Initiative (ADI)—a multi-year effort to help expand opportunity to millions of Americans and future generations through targeted investments in local communities across the United States. Building on years of advancing local solutions that deliver results, the firm will significantly expand investments in proven initiatives that help make the economy work for more people, including by helping them start and grow small bus

headline: Dollar Wraps Up Best Month Since 2024 Amid War in Middle East
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The dollar is on track for its best month since October 2024 as war in the Middle East upends energy markets, buffets economic forecasts, and sends investors rushing to the world’s primary reserve currency.Buoyed by those haven flows, the Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index is up about 3% this month. The US position as the world’s largest producer of oil has also supported the currency amid a surge in global energy prices, as have fading expectations for global growth. “The dollar rallied

headline: US IPO Prospects in Limbo as War Dents Optimism Ahead of SpaceX
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The companies that typically make up the backbone of the US initial public offering market are eyeing the Iran war for signs volatility could boil over and wreck their plans. For banks, there’s a ray of hope — that SpaceX’s potential blockbuster listing could still go ahead, and make their whole year.After a first quarter marked by stop-and-start activity for IPOs, talk has turned to the implications of the raging conflict and the lingering effect of artificial intelligence scares

headline: J.P. Morgan Private Capital Expands Team with Senior Hires
summary: J.P. Morgan Private Capital, the venture and growth equity investment arm within J.P. Morgan Asset Management, today announced the appointments of Rand Araskog and Eric Ghernati as Partners focused on investing in leading growth companies.

headline: How The Michelin (ENXTPA:ML) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Fair Value Estimates
summary: Michelin's updated fair value estimate has shifted from €31.35 to about €33.39, putting it roughly €2 higher than the prior figure. That sits alongside Street price targets clustered around €28 to €30 with mostly Hold ratings, which points to a more cautious tone even as some analysts lift their numbers. Read on to see how these changing targets fit into the broader narrative and how to track future updates with a clear, practical lens. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Compagnie Générale...

headline: Jamie Dimon says the American Dream is ‘slipping out of reach’ — and JPMorgan is spending billions to fix it
summary: "The American Dream is alive, but it's slipping out of reach for too many people—and for future generations," Jamie Dimon said.

content.title: Jamie Dimon says the American Dream is ‘slipping out of reach’ — and JPMorgan is spending billions to fix it
content.summary: "The American Dream is alive, but it's slipping out of reach for too many people—and for future generations," Jamie Dimon said.

thumbnail.caption: Jamie Dimon, chief executive officer of JPMorgan Chase, during the America Business Forum in Miami, Florida, US, on Thursday, Nov. 6, 2025. The forum brings together leaders in business, sports, culture, and technology.
